title: Help removing "NaN" from my formula results
excerpt:
Hello, 
I am using the formula listed below to depicted the total days a project was active. For projects that do not yet have a date, I receive “NaN Days” in my column, which I would rather it say “0 Days.” How do I rep…

posts.author: derrick.veneman (Derrick Veneman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I am using the formula listed below to depicted the total days a project was active. For projects that do not yet have a date, I receive “NaN Days” in my column, which I would rather it say “0 Days.” How do I replace NaN with 0?

DAYS({Completion Date},{Date Approved}) &" Days"

posts.author: Marius.Manic (Marius)
posts.cookedHtml:
Try
IF({Completion Date}=“”,“0 Days”, DAYS({Completion Date},{Date Approved}) &" Days")
